description: Conditional logic for advancing from AWAITING_EXTERNAL_WITNESS to EXTERNAL_WITNESS_ADMITTED, with authority locked false and a separate repository-inside-membrane evaluation required.

transition_rules.condition: ALL checks in EXTERNAL_WITNESS_ADMISSION_CHECK_V0_1 have current_value = true
transition_rules.requires: REPOSITORY_INSIDE_MEMBRANE_EVALUATION as a separate run before any further operational move

transition_rules.condition: ANY check in EXTERNAL_WITNESS_ADMISSION_CHECK_V0_1 has current_value = false or null

critical_constraint: Even after EXTERNAL_WITNESS_ADMITTED, no authority is granted. A separate repository-inside-membrane evaluation must run to determine the next operational move.
notes: This blueprint is conditional design only.
It does not admit the witness.
It does not close the gate.
